review: Why is the app so painfully slow? In 2026. They do have great deals but it's shocking how bad the app runs. It's 2026. Isn't McDonald's the most successful fast food chain in the world? you have billions of dollars and you cannot hire one person who knows how to make an app work properly?
cannot use app without giving permission for precise location. y'all are lucky to get my approximate location, now you get no app on my phone at all
